examples: I hear my teacher call me from the house, "Come and get your ukulele."
Your massage therapist knows that your back muscles are tighter than the strings on a ukulele; your shrink knows that half your tension comes from stress.
For one, Mr. Buffett is a ukulele enthusiast but doesn't appear to play guitar.
Ms. NORMA JEAN (Ukulele quartet member): I'm Norma Jean and I'm a costumer for theater.
